source.manual_default_command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o PasswordAuthentication=no azureuser@10.200.1.12 hostname
source.manual_explicit_key_command: ssh -i <key_path> -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o PasswordAuthentication=no azureuser@10.200.1.12 hostname

target.manual_default_command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o PasswordAuthentication=no opc@10.200.0.250 hostname
target.manual_explicit_key_command: ssh -i <key_path> -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o PasswordAuthentication=no opc@10.200.0.250 hostname
